meta.description: Custom 12-month lawn care program — Kikuyu, Zoysia, Couch — Oakhurst NSW 2761
meta.climate: Humid subtropical — hot summers, mild winters, occasional frost risk
meta.cadence: 2 application events per month: Week 1 (main run) + Week 3 (bio run)
notes: Kelpxtra MUST always be applied SOLO (Pass 1 of bio run) — never tank mixed
Allow Kelpxtra to dry completely before applying bio run Pass 2
Main tank-mix: GreenXtra + Tracemaxx + HiCure — always together on Wk 1
Iron overload rule: Tracemaxx always at 100mL/100sqm (GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm)
When Liquid Iron is added: Tracemaxx ALREADY at reduced rate — no further reduction needed
Tribute — Zoysia (front) + Couch (strips) ONLY — NEVER apply to back lawn (Kikuyu)
Tombstone Duo / Contra M Duo — Kikuyu + Couch ONLY — NEVER apply to Zoysia (front)
Heritage Maxx — DO NOT apply via backpack sprayer (label restriction)
Spartan applied twice per year: March (winter weed prevention) + September (summer weed prevention)
Acelepryn 100mL stock — apply to back lawn (Kikuyu) only in September — consider restocking
Heritage Maxx scheduled November (preventative), February (late summer), December (conditional)
Bio run Pass 2 uses Hydramaxx OR Nature's Soil Wetter (whichever has stock) + Activ8EXTRA ± Stimulus
Couch strips always follow Kikuyu tasks unless explicitly noted
Zoysia (front) receives TX10 only for granular — not Maintain — through most of year (lower N)

weeks.label: Week 1 — Main run: granular + liquid tank-mix

tasks.label: Granular: Maintain (2kg/100m²) — Kikuyu + Couch
tasks.notes: Kikuyu (back) and Couch (strips) only. Water in thoroughly after application. Brush off hard surfaces immediately.

tasks.label: Granular: TX10 (1kg/100m²) — Zoysia only
tasks.notes: Zoysia front lawn only. Water in thoroughly. TX10 lower N is appropriate for Zoysia.

tasks.label: Main tank-mix: Soil Wetter + GreenXtra + Tracemaxx + HiCure + Liquid Iron

products.name: Nature's Soil Wetter
products.note: Soil wetter in tank-mix for summer months

tasks.notes: Liquid Iron added — Tracemaxx already at reduced rate. Dilute each concentrate with water before combining. Allow to dry. Soil wetter first.

weeks.label: Week 3 — Bio run: Kelpxtra solo then soil wetter + organics

tasks.label: Kelpxtra — solo (Pass 1 of bio run)
tasks.notes: MUST be applied SOLO — never tank mix. Allow to dry completely before Pass 2. Summer heat stress — early morning application.

tasks.label: Bio run Pass 2: soil wetter + Activ8EXTRA + Stimulus
tasks.notes: Apply after Kelpxtra has dried. Dilute concentrates with water before mixing. Water in lightly after.

tasks.label: Battle Insecticide — armyworm/pest knockdown (if activity observed)

products.name: Battle Insecticide
products.note: 50mL/100sqm — Kikuyu + Couch. Check Zoysia label before front lawn.

tasks.applicationMethod: Backpack or handheld sprayer — water in
tasks.notes: Apply if armyworm, sod webworm or other pest activity observed. Check label for Zoysia safety before any front lawn application.
tasks.condition: Apply only if insect pest activity (armyworm, caterpillars, etc.) is observed

tasks.label: Heritage Maxx — early summer disease prevention (if humid/warm conditions)

products.name: Heritage Maxx
products.note: 60mL/100sqm systemic preventative fungicide. Follow label carefully.

tasks.applicationMethod: Hose-on or boom sprayer — NOT backpack sprayer
tasks.notes: DO NOT apply via backpack sprayer (label restriction). Preventative systemic fungicide — azoxystrobin. Apply max 2× consecutively then rotate.
tasks.condition: Apply if humid/warm conditions or disease symptoms appear

weeks.label: Week 3 — Bio run: Kelpxtra solo then organics + pest watch

tasks.label: Kelpxtra — solo (Pass 1 of bio run)

tasks.label: Battle Insecticide — armyworm/pest knockdown (if activity observed)

tasks.notes: Apply if armyworm or pest activity observed. Check label for Zoysia safety before any front lawn application.
tasks.condition: Apply only if insect pest activity is observed

cautions.iron-overload: Iron overload risk: Tracemaxx is always applied at 100mL/100sqm when tank-mixing with GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm. When Liquid Iron is also added, Tracemaxx rate remains at 100mL/100sqm (already reduced).
cautions.staining: This product can cause staining on hard surfaces — brush or blow off paths/driveways immediately. Allow to dry on leaf before watering.
cautions.kelpxtra-solo: CRITICAL: Kelpxtra must ALWAYS be applied solo as a separate pass — never tank mixed with any other product. Allow to dry completely before next application.
cautions.tank-mix-dilute-first: When mixing concentrates — always add each product to water separately and dilute before combining in tank.
cautions.water-in: Thoroughly water in after application (minimum 6mm irrigation or equivalent).
cautions.fungicide-rotation: Max 2 consecutive applications of same fungicide group — then rotate to a different mode of action to prevent resistance.
cautions.no-backpack-sprayer: Heritage Maxx label restriction: DO NOT apply via backpack sprayer. Use hose-on, boom or handheld spray equipment.
cautions.low-stock: Low stock alert — check inventory before scheduling. May need to reduce application area or restock.
cautions.pre-emergent-weed-free-first: Pre-emergent herbicide only — has NO effect on established weeds. Lawn must be weed-free before Spartan application.
cautions.tribute-not-kikuyu: CRITICAL: Tribute is NOT safe on Kikuyu. Apply to Zoysia (front) and Couch (strips) ONLY — never spray back lawn.
cautions.tombstone-not-zoysia: Tombstone Duo and Contra M Duo are NOT safe on Zoysia. Apply to Kikuyu and Couch ONLY — never spray front lawn.
